steps.title: Explain the contrast
steps.content: The sentence says Indigenous-led centers contrast with museums that are not Indigenous-led. The underlined portion then explains the nature of that contrast: such museums tend to expect mainly non-Indigenous audiences and use Eurocentric exhibit strategies.

steps.title: Identify the function
steps.content: Choice A is wrong because no term is being defined. Choice B is wrong because no criticism is being answered. Choice D is wrong because no exception is being acknowledged. The remaining choice correctly says the underlined portion elaborates on the preceding claim. The answer is C.
